evals.prompt: Find related work on speculative decoding for LLM inference — I care about recent arXiv stuff and the citation lineage from the original Leviathan et al. paper. Give me a short ranked list and tell me which 2–3 are worth reading closely.
evals.expected_output: Dual search (alphaXiv + OpenAlex), seed/graph or equivalent lineage for Leviathan, ranked list with arXiv ids and match reasons, 2–3 deep-read picks without dumping raw JSON.

evals.prompt: Read https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.00752 and tell me what the selection mechanism actually changes in the SSM recurrence — I need the equations / update rule, not a blog-level summary.
evals.expected_output: alphaXiv overview then section-filtered arxiv2md (not arxiv2md.org API, not raw PDF). Equations/details grounded in arxiv2md output.

evals.prompt: What's the main empirical claim in https://arxiv.org/pdf/2211.17192.pdf about speculative-decoding speedups, and which table/figure supports it? Quote the numbers.
evals.expected_output: Id normalized from PDF URL; overview for orientation; arxiv2md (or figure fetch) before stating numbers; numbers attributed to table/figure/section from the markdown, not overview alone.
